falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the HOLD signal and pattern similarity to a prior bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 300% above the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would suggest a major market shift invalidating the current consolidation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above the prior 52-week high by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would directly contradict the pattern's historical context and blowoff score implications

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
